overview: Tinkro Robotics is a premium ecommerce platform for robotics and STEM lab solutions targeting schools, students, and institutions. Features a cinematic frontend, full admin control panel, Firebase-powered dynamic content, PWA support, and advanced ecommerce with Razorpay payments.
features: Full admin dashboard with Firebase Authentication, Firestore, and Storage
Multi-category product assignment with checkbox multi-select UI
Category management with image upload to Firebase Storage
Dynamic frontend filtering by category using Firestore array-contains queries
Multi-image product upload with preview, delete, and replace
Razorpay payment integration with order tracking
User dashboard with order history, tracking, addresses, and profile
PWA with offline support and installable app
Real-time Firestore listeners for live content updates
Glassmorphism UI with smooth Framer Motion animations
